combined_text: 5-2 Diet Carrot and Cumin Soup 5-2 Diet Carrot and Cumin Soup February 13, 2013 by Fiona Maclean 5 Comments Carrot and Cumin Soup – Frugal 5-2 Diet Fast Day Recipe: At this time of year when the weather is cold and winter seems to have gone on for ever, warming soups are a real mainstay for me, especially when I am on a 5-2 diet
